# Test scenario: All nodes are at ~95% CPU utilization.
#
# When the entire cluster is uniformly saturated, no node is meaningfully above
# or below the mean.
#
# s4 has no replicas but is equally overloaded (its CPU comes from non-SQL
# work). s1 holds a lease for a low-CPU range, giving it something to try
# shedding.
#
# Baseline behavior: all stores are classified as loadNormal because
# fractionAbove ≈ 0 (everyone is at the mean). The old utilization gate
# (meanUtil*1.1 < fractionUsed) doesn't fire either since no store is above
# the mean. This means 95%-utilized stores look "normally loaded", which is
# misleading — the cluster is clearly saturated.

set-store
  store-id=1 node-id=1
  store-id=2 node-id=2
  store-id=3 node-id=3
  store-id=4 node-id=4
----
node-id=1 locality-tiers=node=1
  store-id=1 attrs=
node-id=2 locality-tiers=node=2
  store-id=2 attrs=
node-id=3 locality-tiers=node=3
  store-id=3 attrs=
node-id=4 locality-tiers=node=4
  store-id=4 attrs=

# All four stores are at 95% CPU utilization (950 out of 1000).
store-load-msg
  store-id=1 node-id=1 load=[950,0,0] capacity=[1000,-1,1000] secondary-load=0 load-time=0s
  store-id=2 node-id=2 load=[950,0,0] capacity=[1000,-1,1000] secondary-load=0 load-time=0s
  store-id=3 node-id=3 load=[950,0,0] capacity=[1000,-1,1000] secondary-load=0 load-time=0s
  store-id=4 node-id=4 load=[950,0,0] capacity=[1000,-1,1000] secondary-load=0 load-time=0s
----

get-load-info
----
store-id=1 node-id=1 status=ok accepting all reported=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] adjusted=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] node-reported-cpu=950 node-adjusted-cpu=950 seq=1
store-id=2 node-id=2 status=ok accepting all reported=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] adjusted=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] node-reported-cpu=950 node-adjusted-cpu=950 seq=1
store-id=3 node-id=3 status=ok accepting all reported=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] adjusted=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] node-reported-cpu=950 node-adjusted-cpu=950 seq=1
store-id=4 node-id=4 status=ok accepting all reported=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] adjusted=[cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] node-reported-cpu=950 node-adjusted-cpu=950 seq=1

# s1 holds a lease for a low-CPU range. s4 has no replicas.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1 load=[5,0,0] raft-cpu=100
    store-id=1 replica-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 replica-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 replica-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3 constraints={} voter_constraints={}
----

# Advance past the lease shedding grace period.
tick seconds=300
----
t=5m0s

rebalance-stores store-id=1
----
[mmaid=1] rebalanceStores begins
[mmaid=1] cluster means: (stores-load [cpu:950ns/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B]) (stores-capacity [cpu:1µs/s, write-bandwidth:unknown/s, byte-size:1.0 kB]) (nodes-cpu-load 950) (nodes-cpu-capacity 1000)
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (s1): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s1): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s1): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00% meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (n1): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] evaluating s1: node load loadNormal, store load loadNormal, worst dim CPURate
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (s2): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s2): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s2): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00% meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (n2): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] evaluating s2: node load loadNormal, store load loadNormal, worst dim CPURate
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00% meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (n3): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] evaluating s3: node load loadNormal, store load loadNormal, worst dim CPURate
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=WriteBandwidth (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=ByteSize (s4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=0 meanLoad=0 fractionUsed=0.00% meanUtil=0.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] load summary for dim=CPURate (n4): loadNormal, reason: load is within 5% of mean [load=950 meanLoad=950 fractionUsed=95.00% meanUtil=95.00% capacity=1000]
[mmaid=1] evaluating s4: node load loadNormal, store load loadNormal, worst dim CPURate
[mmaid=1] rebalancing pass summary [local=s1]: none
pending(0)
